design.shrinkage: hierarchical: coach_effect_c ~ N(mu_global, tau^2); mu_global~N(0,..); tau~HalfCauchy
design.posterior: per-coach sampled/posterior distribution required in deliverable
design.short_tenure_guard: match count < 10 -> strong shrinkage to mu_global, wide posterior
design.collinearity: report VIF of coach_effect vs playerQuality; ridge prior if VIF>5
design.selection_bias: control pre-tenure xg_diff sliding mean (as-of) to strip rebound effect
design.enter_model_rule: only if OOS shows stable positive delta AND cross-era stable AND short-tenure interval not degraded; else usedInModel:false

blockers: tenure history: env COACH_RESEARCH_TENURE_DIR not set
international results pool: env COACH_RESEARCH_POOL_DIR not set
xG/lineup reference: COACH_RESEARCH_XG_REF not set (F artifact reference)
conclusion: OOS estimation BLOCKED: required read-only inputs missing. No coefficients fabricated. Coach effect remains usedInModel:false. Supply COACH_RESEARCH_TENURE_DIR, COACH_RESEARCH_POOL_DIR and (for xg residual) COACH_RESEARCH_XG_REF to run.
